queries.question: Where John attended the press conference and on what day?
queries.sql: SELECT PressConferences.Date, PressConferences.Location FROM PressConferences JOIN ReportersAttending ON ReportersAttending.ConferenceID = PressConferences.ConferenceID JOIN Reporters ON ReportersAttending.ReporterID = Reporters.ReporterID WHERE Reporters.FirstName = 'John';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date ?location WHERE {
  ?pressconferences a :Press_Conferences .
  ?reportersattending a :ReportersAttending .
  ?reportersattending p:hasPressConferences ?pressconferences .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reportersattending p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?pressconferences p:Date ?date .
  ?pressconferences p:location ?location .
  ?reporters p:FirstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = "John")
}

queries.question: Where John attended the press conference and on what day and time?
queries.sql: SELECT PressConferences.Date, Time, PressConferences.Location FROM PressConferences JOIN ReportersAttending ON ReportersAttending.ConferenceID = PressConferences.ConferenceID JOIN Reporters ON ReportersAttending.ReporterID = Reporters.ReporterID WHERE Reporters.FirstName = 'John';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date ?time ?location WHERE {
  ?pressconferences a :Press_Conferences .
  ?reportersattending a :ReportersAttending .
  ?reportersattending p:hasPressConferences ?pressconferences .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reportersattending p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?pressconferences p:Date ?date .
  ?pressconferences p:Time ?time .
  ?pressconferences p:location ?location .
  ?reporters p:FirstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = "John")
}

queries.question: What was the date and time of the press conference that Jane attended?
queries.sql: SELECT Date, Time, ReporterAttendeeID FROM PressConferences JOIN ReportersAttending ON ReportersAttending.ConferenceID = PressConferences.ConferenceID JOIN Reporters ON Reporters.ReporterID = ReportersAttending.ReporterID WHERE Reporters.FirstName = "Jane"

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date ?time ?reporterattendeeid WHERE {

  ?reportersattending p:hasPressConferences ?pressconferences .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reportersattending p:hasReporters ?reporters .

  ?pressconferences p:Time ?time .
  ?reportersattending p:ReporterAttendeeID ?reporterattendeeid .
  ?reporters p:FirstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = "Jane")
}

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?date ?location WHERE {
  ?pressconferences a :Press_Conferences .
  ?reportersattending a :ReportersAttending .
  ?reportersattending p:hasPressConferences ?pressconferences .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reportersattending p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?pressconferences p:Date ?date .
  ?pressconferences p:location ?location .
  ?reporters p:FirstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = "John")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?date ?time ?location WHERE {
  ?pressconferences a :Press_Conferences .
  ?reportersattending a :ReportersAttending .
  ?reportersattending p:hasPressConferences ?pressconferences .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reportersattending p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?pressconferences p:Date ?date .
  ?pressconferences p:Time ?time .
  ?pressconferences p:location ?location .
  ?reporters p:FirstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = "John")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?time ?location WHERE {
  ?pressconferences a :Press_Conferences .
  ?reportersattending a :ReportersAttending .
  ?reportersattending p:hasPressConferences ?pressconferences .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reportersattending p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?pressconferences p:Time ?time .
  ?pressconferences p:location ?location .
  ?reporters p:FirstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = "John")
} }
}
